sa:items.rdfs:label: Broadsword
sa:items.sa:description: A broad-bladed sword equally effective for slashing and blunt impact. Its versatile design permits one-handed or two-handed use, making it the preferred choice of knights and mercenaries throughout many cultures.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Versatile(1d10) Specialization 1 xp deal bludgenoning or slashing whichever is the most benefitial for you

sa:items.rdfs:label: Chain Axe
sa:items.sa:description: A chain-driven rotating blade of brutal design. Favored by brutal warriors and considered horrifying by civilized societies, this weapon is exceptionally effective when penetrating armor.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Double damage against targets with no hardness or against targets that have their hardness ignored or completly mitigated. Do not double the number of dice, double the values of the rolled dice

sa:items.rdfs:label: Chain sword
sa:items.sa:description: A chain-sword of brutal design. Though less destructive than the Chain Axe, it remains horrifying to most civilized societies. Constant operational noise announces the wielder's presence, effectively eliminating surprise.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Double damage against targets with no hardness or against targets that have their hardness ignored or completly mitigated. Do not double the number of dice, double the values of the rolled dice

sa:items.rdfs:label: Elven Sliver Sword
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Finesse. Never add Str to damage. Cannot be used to knockdown, trip or disarm
sa:items.sa:description: A hilt that projects a 3-4ft long wormhole sliver capable of slicing through matter with ease.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Energized Axe
sa:items.sa:description: An axe blade wrapped in superheated plasma technology. Combines traditional melee design with modern energy systems. Effective against both organic and mechanical targets.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Energized Claws
sa:items.sa:description: Mounted claw weapons that project plasma edges. Designed for power armor integration, they provide rapid strikes with both cleaving and penetration capabilities.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Occupies both hands or both arm hardpoints on powerarmors. Does not deal decreased damage when cleaving. Weight is pr claw

sa:items.rdfs:label: Energized Greatsword
sa:items.sa:description: A massive plasma-infused greatsword capable of devastating area attacks.The energy discharge creates a cone of destruction with each swing. Requires significant strength to wield effectively.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Energized Katana
sa:items.sa:description: A traditional katana enhanced with plasma technology for modern combat. It retains the elegant design philosophy of its archaic predecessor while delivering contemporary lethality.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Specialization 1 xp Use katanas one handed

sa:items.rdfs:label: Energized maul
sa:items.sa:description: A two-handed maul generating kinetic force fields. Crushes both armor and bone with equal efficiency. The shockwave from each impact creates area denial effects.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Does damage in 10ft cone. Cone attack recharges in 1d3 rounds. +1d4 on knockdown checks.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Greataxe
sa:items.sa:description: A massive two-handed axe passed down through generations. The defining weapon of elite warriors and barbarian champions. Requires both strength and skill to use effectively in combat.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Greatsword
sa:items.sa:description: A long, straight blade designed for both sweeping slashes and powerful thrusts. The classic weapon of knights and professional soldiers. Balanced between control and devastating power.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Grind flail
sa:items.sa:description: A flail like weapon with a chain-driven head of orcish origin that deals both slashing and blunt damage. Widely considered barbaric and horrifying by civilized societies, this weapon is extremely difficult to control.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Does half slashing and half bludgenoing damage. Costs 12k outside of orcish colonies. Treated as a martial weapon by orcs and half-orcs. Most armed forces frown upon the use of this weapon. Attacks made with a Grindflail have 10 ft reach

sa:items.rdfs:label: HF Axe
sa:items.sa:description: A high-frequency vibrating axe that cuts through material with molecular precision. Effective and straightforward—a tool as much as a weapon. Popular with soldiers and laborers alike.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Its an axe. Chop stuff.

sa:items.rdfs:label: HF Bladed whip
sa:items.sa:description: A weapon of prestige and authority among drow nobility. High-frequency blade edges line a flexible whip, enabling devastating strikes from up to 15 feet away. Ownership often indicates rank and status.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Classic drow weapon, often used to indicate rank and standing. Usually available for a lower price for Highborne drow in a drow settlement of sufficient size. Can attack targets in within 15 ft reach

sa:items.rdfs:label: HF Dagger
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Finesse. Thrown.
sa:items.sa:description: A small high-frequency blade effective in both melee and ranged combat. The vibrating edge exploits gaps in armor with precision. Favored by assassins and infiltrators.

sa:items.rdfs:label: HF Rapier
sa:items.sa:description: An elegant high-frequency thrusting weapon. The blade's vibration ensures armor penetration with minimal effort. Preferred by duelists and courtiers who value finesse over brute force.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Finesse.

sa:items.rdfs:label: HF Stiletto
sa:items.sa:description: A needle-like blade vibrating at high frequency. Specifically designed to exploit weaknesses in armor and bypass damage reduction. A favored weapon of assassins and armor specialists.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Spezialisation 1 xp Ignore 1 DR and 5 hardness.

sa:items.rdfs:label: High Frequency Katana
sa:items.sa:description: A high-frequency variant of the traditional katana. It bridges ancient martial philosophy with modern technology.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Spezialication 1 xp You can use katanas 1 handed

sa:items.rdfs:label: Impact mace
sa:items.sa:description: A heavy striking weapon designed to concentrate impact force and defeat armor. Most effective against hardened targets where slashing fails. Preferred by armor-breakers and siege weapon operators.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Specialization 1 xp Ignore 5 hardness when using maces

sa:items.rdfs:label: Katana
sa:items.sa:description: A curved single-edge blade refined over centuries of martial tradition. The balance of the weapon allows skilled practitioners to wield it with surprising grace. A symbol of honor and discipline.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Spezialication 1xp you can use katanas 1 handed

sa:items.rdfs:label: Longbow
sa:items.sa:description: A tall bow capable of delivering arrows with impressive force and accuracy. The weapon of choice for hunters and ranged combatants. Requires years of practice to use effectively.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Mace
sa:items.sa:description: A straightforward blunt weapon consisting of a weighted head on a haft. Effective against both unarmored and armored opponents. Simple to use and maintain, making it popular among soldiers and militia.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Specialization 1 xp Ignore 5 hardness when using maces, hammers og mauls

sa:items.rdfs:label: Maul
sa:items.sa:description: An enormous two-handed hammer designed to crush through defenses. Its sheer weight generates consistent knockdown effects. Favored by barbarians, giants, and siege weapon operators.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Specialization 1 xp Ignore 5 hardness when using maces, hammers og mauls

sa:items.rdfs:label: Plasma Dagger
sa:items.sa:description: A small blade wrapped in plasma energy, deadly despite its diminutive size. Equally effective thrown or wielded in close combat, its superheated edge penetrates armor with ease.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Finesse. Thrown. Can remain active or 10 minutes in inc.s of 1 minute  per power pack.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Power fist
sa:items.sa:description: A power-assisted gauntlet propelled by electromagnetic force. Devastating in close quarters, it combines kinetic blunt force with electrical damage. Cooling time is required between maximum-power strikes.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Cools down in 1d3 rounds or spend an action to rapidly cool the weapon

sa:items.rdfs:label: Rapier
sa:items.sa:description: A light, agile blade designed for precision striking. The preferred weapon of duelists and swordmasters who value technique and timing over brute strength.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Scimitar
sa:items.sa:description: A curved blade originating from desert cultures. The curved design enables flowing, sweeping motions ideal for mounted combat and formation fighting. A classic weapon of cavalry and nomadic warriors.

sa:items.rdfs:label: Sick stick
sa:items.sa:description: A non-lethal weapon designed to incapacitate without causing death. Each strike induces nausea and disorientation in targets. Favored by peacekeepers and law enforcement for subduing threats without permanent injury.
sa:items.sa:specialProperties: Targets that take damage from this weapon must take a DC 10 con save or become nauseated
